kind.description:
`USER` for member-sent messages; `SYSTEM_MILESTONE` for
auto-generated messages when a milestone post is created in a group
with chat enabled.

content.description: The message text; `null` for attachment-only messages.

attachmentUrl.description:
A photo/video path (`/uploads/...`); `null` if the message
carries no attachment.

refPostId.description:
For `SYSTEM_MILESTONE` messages, the milestone post this message
was triggered by; `null` otherwise.

readBy.description:
Members who have marked the chat read at or after this message.
Derived read-time from per-user read positions, not a per-message
receipt list.
